rationale.R1.5: The output provides a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags several claim/evidence mismatches and uncertainties, providing detailed feedback on confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or substantial differences in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content while addressing potential downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some traceability could be improved.
